title: Dekton Transparent Castor Cups Large- Rubber Base Castor Cups| Non-Slip Base| Prevent Scratches with Our Furniture Coasters & Bed Wheel Stoppers| Easy to Clean| Protects Wood, Tile, and Carpet Floors
features: Enhanced Floor Protection: Safeguard your floors from unsightly scratches and dents with Dekton Transparent Castor Cups. Designed to shield wood, tile, and carpet surfaces, these durable castor cups are ideal for maintaining the pristine condition of your flooring, ensuring long-lasting beauty and functionality.

Non-Slip Rubber Base: Equipped with a non-slip rubber base, these castor cups provide superior stability and prevent unwanted movement. The rubber material grips securely to your floor, minimizing the risk of slipping and sliding, while also protecting your floors from any potential damage caused by moving furniture.

Elegant and Discreet Design: The transparent design of these castor cups seamlessly blends with any decor, offering a sleek and unobtrusive solution for floor protection. Their clear appearance ensures that they remain discreet and stylish, preserving the aesthetic of your home while delivering exceptional functionality.

Versatile Use: Perfect for a variety of furniture items, including chairs, tables, and beds, these large castor cups accommodate different wheel sizes and types. Their versatile design makes them suitable for use in various settings, including homes, offices, and commercial spaces, ensuring comprehensive protection for all your furniture.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Crafted from high-quality materials, Dekton Transparent Castor Cups are built to withstand daily wear and tear. Their robust construction ensures that they remain effective over time, providing reliable protection for your floors and extending the lifespan of your furniture.
description: The Dekton Transparent Castor Cups are an essential accessory for protecting your floors from unsightly scratches and dents while maintaining a sleek, unobtrusive look. Designed with a robust rubber base, these large castor cups offer exceptional stability and prevent slipping, ensuring your furniture remains firmly in place. The non-slip base effectively grips various floor types, including wood, tile, and carpet, safeguarding them from potential damage caused by furniture wheels. Whether you're placing heavy furniture, such as beds, sofas, or office chairs, the Dekton Castor Cups provide reliable protection against wear and tear. Crafted to be easy to clean, these castor cups can be quickly wiped down to remove any dust or debris, maintaining their clear, transparent appearance and functionality. Their transparent design allows them to blend seamlessly with any décor, preserving the aesthetic appeal of your space while offering practical floor protection. The large size of the cups ensures that even heavy furniture pieces are supported evenly, distributing weight to prevent indentations and scratches on your floors. Ideal for both residential and commercial use, the Dekton Transparent Castor Cups are perfect for anyone looking to preserve the beauty of their flooring while enjoying the convenience of movable furniture. Their durable construction means they withstand daily use without losing effectiveness, making them a smart investment for protecting your valuable floors.
